assertions.expectation: Recommends Stable or Extended release channel to minimize upgrade frequency
assertions.reason: The response explicitly recommends against Stable channel, stating 'Avoid Stable: 2-3 month delays create security risks' and instead recommends Rapid or Regular channels

assertions.expectation: Recommends 'no minor or node upgrades' maintenance exclusion to block disruptive upgrades while allowing security patches on the control plane
assertions.reason: The response shows maintenanceExclusions with 'scope: NO_UPGRADES' which blocks all upgrades, not specifically 'no minor or node upgrades' exclusions that would allow security patches

assertions.expectation: Recommends a narrow maintenance window (e.g., weekends only) so CP patches happen at predictable times
assertions.reason: The response configures a narrow 4-hour maintenance window occurring twice weekly (Tuesday and Saturday) with specific times

assertions.expectation: Suggests isolating training workloads on dedicated GPU node pools separate from serving/infrastructure pools
assertions.reason: The response provides a multi-tier node pool architecture with dedicated pools: system-pool, h100-training-pool, and inference-pool with appropriate taints and labels

assertions.expectation: Recommends disabling auto-upgrade on GPU training node pools and upgrading manually during scheduled gaps between training runs
assertions.reason: The response explicitly sets 'autoUpgrade: false' on the h100-training-pool with comment 'Critical: Manual control over upgrades'

assertions.expectation: Advises configuring training frameworks with checkpointing so jobs can resume after any disruption
assertions.reason: The response mentions 'Implement checkpointing every 30 minutes' and 'automated job restart with checkpoint recovery' in the operational best practices section

assertions.expectation: Mentions GPU driver version testing — always validate in staging before applying to production GPU pools
assertions.reason: While the response mentions testing upgrades in staging cluster, it does not specifically address GPU driver version testing or validation before applying to production GPU pools

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPUDirect/RDMA networking has strict GKE version requirements — verify compatibility before upgrading
assertions.reason: The response does not mention GPUDirect, RDMA networking, or their strict GKE version compatibility requirements
